summary: Iteration 176: Tested footer full-width fix (admin + store pages) and Resources price/currency filter fix. All 9 backend API tests and all 10 frontend UI tests passed. Both fixes work correctly end-to-end.
test_credentials: Partner code: automate-accounts | Admin: admin@automateaccounts.local / ChangeMe123!
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both fixes verified working: (1) Footer fix: BaseLayout in App.tsx now renders AppFooter after </main> (outside aa-container), making footer span full viewport width on admin and all BaseLayout pages. Admin.tsx no longer renders its own AppFooter. (2) Resources price/currency filter: backend/routes/resources.py correctly handles price_min, price_max, price_currency params. Frontend ResourcesTab.tsx sends these as query params. Test resource: title='test', price=100, currency=USD, category='Scope - Final Won'. Minor console warning noted in dev tools: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <option>' - this is a React hydration warning from dev tooling injecting x-file-name attributes inside option elements in ColHeader.tsx select. This is non-blocking and not a production issue.

evidence: Footer width=1920px matches viewport width=1920px on admin page
Footer background color: rgb(15, 23, 42) (dark primary color spans full width)
BaseLayout renders AppFooter after </main> outside aa-container in App.tsx
Admin.tsx no longer renders its own AppFooter
Footer width=1920px matches viewport on store page
Regression: footer still full width on Store page
price_min=50: returns 1 resource (test resource with price=100)
price_min=200: returns 0 resources ('No resources yet' shown)
Backend API and frontend filter both work correctly
Blue dot indicator appears on Price column header when currency is set
Clear button resets filter and removes blue dot
